testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.domain.video.storage.LocalVideoStorageServiceTest

testcase.name: creates the storage directory if it does not yet exist()
path traversal in the original filename is reduced to the leaf name()
stores uploaded mp4 under the configured root with a UUID filename()
each upload of the same original filename gets a unique stored filename()
falls back to video mp4 when contentType is missing()
rejects upload with no original filename()

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-02T23:50:32.664+09:00 INFO 57102 --- [adsignage] [ Test worker] m.o.a.d.v.s.LocalVideoStorageService : video stored filename=8c446e81-c94f-4988-aa5e-5d7db0273cf2.mp4
